text: What is the CPR procedure for a six-year-old boy?

options.text: A) 15 compressions to 1 breath, 5 cycles in one minute
B) 15 compressions to 2 breaths, 4 cycles in one minute
C) 5 compressions to 1 breath, 12 cycles in one minute

explanation: For a child aged puberty or younger, CPR guidelines recommend a compression-to-ventilation ratio of 30:2 for single rescuers and 15:2 for two rescuers, with approximately 5 cycles (about 2 minutes) per minute.
